title: ULTIMATE SMP LITE
description: A lightweight SMP utility plugin with homes, teams, TPA, scoreboard, and realistic tree gravity. Designed for clean, simple, performance-friendly survival servers.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29717ba498fb8e009db0328cf97bf8de55a4bd2.png)
# ✨ Features

## 🏠 Homes System  

**/sethome <name> — Create named homes**

**/home [name] — Teleport to a home or open a GUI**

**/homes — List your homes**

**/delhome <name> — Delete a home**

**Teleport delay & movement cancel**

**Player-specific home limits**

**Admin command to add extra homes:**
**/usmplite addhome <player> <amount>**



---

## 👥 Teams System

**Create, join, leave, and manage teams**

**Invite/kick/promote members**

**GUI team manager for easy control**

**Team name & tag placeholders integrated into scoreboard**

**Simple, friendly commands under /team**



---

## 🔄 Teleport System

**/tpa <player> — Send teleport requests**

**/tpaccept to accept**

**/tpdeny to deny**

**Request expiration timer**

**Safe, predictable behaviour for SMP servers**



---

## 📊 Configurable Sidebar Scoreboard

**Fully editable scoreboard layout**

**Supports color codes (&a, &l, etc.)**

**Auto-updating**

**Optional _health-under-name hearts_ display**



---

## 🌳 Realistic Tree Gravity

**A uniquely polished feature:**

**Works only on naturally-generated trees**

**Player-placed logs are automatically ignored**

**Break the bottom log → entire trunk falls**

**Break a middle log → upper part of the tree falls**

**Village/structure logs are untouched**

**Smooth, throttled performance**

**Fully configurable**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9277887dcf713bdf2c2e10f669f326fcd502cce5.gif)

</details>





---

## ⚙️ Admin Commands

**/usmplite reload**
**/usmplite info**
**/usmplite addhome <player> <amount>**
**/usmplite help**

**Easy, clean, and safe.**


---

## 🧩 Why UltimateSMP Lite?

**Simple, clean, intuitive features**

**Fully configurable messages, scoreboard, and systems**

**Very low overhead**

**Zero unnecessary features or bloat**

**Perfect for SMPs, small communities, and private friend servers**

**Built for stability & user experience**



---

## 🛠️ Configuration

**Everything is adjustable:**

**Scoreboard layout**

**All messages**

**Home limits**

**Teleport delays**

**Tree gravity behavior**

**Team settings**

**Health display**

**And more…**


---


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## 📌 Planned Features

**PlaceholderAPI expansion (optional)**

**Better team GUI customization**

**Per-world scoreboard configuration**

**Custom tree-gravity animations**

</details>
